/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O2 CMakeFiles/muduo-im.dir/src/server/main.cpp.o -o muduo-im  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ly/workspaces/im/muduo-im/build/third_party/mymuduo-http third_party/mymuduo-http/libmymuduo.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so -lpthread
